retry_reason: Failure indicates the task's refcount has reached zero; the task is dying or dead, so retrying would not succeed.
contract_summary: This is a get-wrapper that conditionally acquires a reference on a task_struct by incrementing its rcu_users refcount if it is non-zero. On success, it returns the task pointer, transferring ownership of the reference to the caller, who must later release it with a corresponding put (e.g., bpf_task_release). On failure (NULL return), no reference was taken, and the task must not be used. The function is safe to call without holding any locks; the refcount operation is atomic and does not require RCU read-side protection. Callers must check the return value for NULL.
